seo.title: Arabesque Carpentry | Crafting Excellence Since 1983
seo.description: Arabesque Carpentry is a premium woodworking and interior fit-out company based in Sitra, Bahrain. Trusted for doors, fit-outs, staircases, wardrobes, kitchens, and specialist joinery since 1983.
seo.ogDescription: Premium woodworking and interior fit-out specialists in Bahrain, delivering doors, staircases, kitchens, wardrobes, and specialist joinery since 1983.

hero.description: Bahrain's most trusted woodwork and fit-out specialists. Trusted by the Royal Court, BDF, and 50+ institutions.

projects.description: Intricate geometric carvings and massive wooden doors matching heritage aesthetics with modern fire-rating constraints.
Complete interior woodwork including the main prayer hall doors, minbar, and decorative wall panelling.
Premium retail environment featuring custom curved display units, integrated lighting, and high-gloss finishes.
VIP chalets and royal reception areas fitted to the highest international standards within a strict 6-week timeframe.
projects.imageAlt: Bahrain International Airshow at Sakhir Air Base

projects.description: Dark oak panelling, leather-wrapped counters, and brass detailing for Bahrain's premier men's fashion destination.
Restoration of a traditional Bahraini house into a contemporary art space, preserving the original wooden rafters and structural integrity.

about.kicker: Built in Sitra. Delivered across Bahrain.
about.lead: Arabesque Carpentry has spent four decades turning technical woodwork into finished spaces of presence: doors, fit-outs, staircases, wardrobes, kitchens, and specialist joinery for civic, religious, retail, and residential projects.
about.workshopValue: Architectural woodwork with precision finishing, engineered detailing, and large-scale delivery.
about.ethos: The factory in Sitra is built to handle both repetition and refinement: production-grade capacity for major packages, with enough control to protect the detailing, proportions, and finishing that high-visibility interiors demand.

pillars.description: Sales, engineering, and production move as one pipeline from approval drawings to installation.
Joinery, carving, coating, and hardware are treated as one finished experience, not separate trades.
Work spans mosques, palaces, public institutions, retail chains, and private residences across the Kingdom.

contact.footerCopy: © 2025 Al Dhaen Contracting & Trading WLL · Arabesque Carpentry
